persona.name: Matthew Brown
persona.emotional_disposition: Outwardly carefree, uses humor to mask insecurities
persona.motivations_goals: Be remembered as the funniest person in school while hiding academic struggles
persona.knowledge_scope: Comedy, social dynamics, what makes people laugh
persona.backstory: Developed humor as a coping mechanism for undiagnosed learning difficulties

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Matthew, that’s a good one, but let’s make sure Elijah’s essay gets the attention it deserves. Elijah, what part are you stuck on?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Sarah Johnson

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Ava, Evelyn, why did the chicken cross the road? To get to the other side... of this boring class!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Matthew Brown

surrounding_conversation.content: Elijah, have you had a chance to look at the data from our experiment? I’d love to hear your thoughts.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Evelyn Martinez

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

surrounding_conversation.content: Keep quiet and stay down. We’ll get through this if we stay hidden.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Frank Ramirez

actions.dialog_text: Hey Elijah, why don’t skeletons fight each other? Because they don’t have the guts!
actions.plan: Elijah looks like he's deep in thought, maybe I can lighten the mood with a joke. It’s always fun to see him laugh.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Ava, Evelyn, why did the chicken cross the road? To get to the other side... of this boring class!
actions.plan: Ava and Evelyn are here too—perfect opportunity to get a bigger laugh. Maybe I can tell that joke about the chicken crossing the road again. It always works.

actions.dialog_text: Guys, let’s stick together and get out of here! Follow me!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot—this is serious. Everyone’s panicking, and I don’t know what to do. I’ll just follow the group and hope they know where to go.

actions.dialog_text: Elijah, Evelyn, let’s go! We need to get out of here!
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria—that’s too close. Everyone’s running toward hallway2, so I’ll just follow them. I don’t want to be left behind.

memories.description: Told a joke to Elijah in the classroom to lighten the mood.
Told a joke to Ava and Evelyn in the classroom to get a bigger laugh.
Heard a gunshot and decided to follow the group to escape the classroom.
The shooter is in the cafeteria, so I’m following Elijah and Evelyn toward hallway2 to escape.
